from source import bitcount

def test_bitcount_large_input():
    # 127 is 0b1111111, which has 7 set bits.
    # The buggy XOR version will loop forever (or until timeout) because
    # n ^= n - 1 does not clear the lowest set bit.
    # The fixed AND version should correctly return 7.
    assert bitcount(127) == 7, "bitcount(127) should be 7"
